title: Archive contains no generated code — all deliverables missing
evidence: find . shows only TASK.md remains; no main.py/app.py, no test files, no README.md, no requirements.txt. Compare rep1 which has app.py, test_app.py, README.md, requirements.txt. _agent_stdout.log shows the write_file tool 'Refusing to write to sensitive system path: .../retort-9bcf44e083a6/requirements.txt', so the agent's file writes never landed in the workspace.
suggestion: Fix the write_file guard that classifies the retort temp workspace under /private/var/folders as a 'sensitive system path'; re-run so deliverables are actually persisted and archived.

title: scores.json misrepresents the run: test_coverage=0.96 but zero code was measured
evidence: scores.json reports test_coverage=0.96, defect_rate=1.0, code_quality=0.833; but .coverage SQLite 'file' table has 0 rows (no files instrumented) and no .py files exist in the archive. This run is absent from retort.db (only replicate 1 is 'completed'). The scores are unbacked by any code and must not be treated as a passing run.
suggestion: Have the scorer fail closed when the workspace has no source files / coverage instruments zero files, instead of emitting a high test_coverage.

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests — no test files present
evidence: No test_*.py in archive; .coverage 'file' table count = 0.
suggestion: Persist and run tests in the workspace.

title: README.md with setup/run instructions — absent
evidence: find . finds no README.md (rep1 has one).
